text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Where are the stars?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Even in daylight, they're up in the sky... but
invisible to our eyes.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(And ever since that day you left my side, I
haven't been able to feel your presence.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Now when I'm racing or looking up at the stars, I
can't feel you like I used to...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(But even though I can't sense you, I know you're
always watching, just like a star in the light.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Still...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Even if you aren't watching at this very
moment...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make you proud.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You and... one more person. I've got two people
to show off to now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Today is the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Since this is an international race, if I win...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll become the best big sister in the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning of the Japan Cup. A somewhat
solemn air circulates throughout Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega, walking forward with her face held
high, stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Can I talk with them a little bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look ahead and realize who she's referring to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It makes me smile knowing that I didn't need to
encourage her to go speak with her peers.
choice_data_list: Go ahead. I'll be in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Right. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Tokyo, the promised land. The windswept
grass twinkles as the hearts of the audience
tremble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today is a day that will be remembered for
generations. The Overlord's—no.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Centurial Overlord's coronation day! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah... Um... M-m-me too!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm gonna have m-my own coronation! J-j-just
you wait!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Excellent!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Good morning, you two.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Well, well, well! If it isn't Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Paying us a visit before the race means you must
have a thought or two to share.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's right—a message for your rivals with whom
you shall paint a vivid picture of our generation!
Your rivals by destiny!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
How many times do I have to tell you? I won't be
part of any of your plays.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I only have one thing to say to the pretend
Overlord and her performative nemesis.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for my own goals. To accomplish my
dream...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The position of first-magnitude star will be mine
and mine alone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's all I have to say.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! You can't just sing your part and take
off! I have my own lines to perform!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you expect me to overlook a term like
"first-magnitude star"?! The one who captures the
hearts of the audience and shines the brightest...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That's what we call a top star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Which is a title reserved for me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Then bring it on.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume from around the world are gathered
here at Fuchu to pursue honor and fame! The
Japan Cup is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: The crowd is really fired up...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha... My legs are trembling... I guess I'm a little
scared.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I knew this would happen if I came. It's really
hitting me... that I might never crawl back up to
that level.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: But I won't stop!
